adobe-wall-dawn.alt_text: A bare adobe wall catching the first warm light of dawn
adobe-wall-dawn.generation_prompt: Editorial product-glamour photograph of a bare adobe wall at dawn, hand-troweled clay surface in pale ochre tones, raking sunrise light from the lower left, soft warm shadows pooling along subtle imperfections in the plaster, a hint of dust suspended in the air, no objects in frame, deep negative space, cinematic large-format feel, awwwards-grade still life, no text or logos.
adobe-wall-dawn.placement: Full-bleed opening plate hero - fetchpriority=high background image.

adobe-wall-texture.generation_prompt: Award-quality close still of a high-desert adobe wall surface, hand-applied clay plaster with subtle trowel marks and faint mineral striations, neutral warm bone-to-ochre tonal range, very gentle directional light from camera-left, no objects in frame, photographed at a slight tilt to show texture, edge-to-edge composition for use behind a centered product, cinematic stillness, no text or logos.
adobe-wall-texture.placement: Pinned product canvas - wall texture sitting behind the bottle through all four sun washes.

mezcal-bottle-pinned.alt_text: A single terracotta-glassed bottle of {{BRAND}} mezcal, centered against an adobe wall
mezcal-bottle-pinned.generation_prompt: Editorial product-glamour photograph of a single hand-blown clay-tinted glass mezcal bottle, slim shouldered silhouette with a thick neck and a deep terracotta wax seal, blank label suggested but unreadable, centered composition against soft adobe-toned background, gentle warm key light from upper-left modeling the curvature, faint pooled shadow beneath, large-format stillness, museum-grade restraint, awwwards single-product hero register, no text or logos.
mezcal-bottle-pinned.placement: Centered, pinned bottle that stays fixed while the wall washes change behind it.

mezcal-bottle-night.alt_text: The same bottle, photographed against night-darkened clay, a single warm light catching its shoulder
mezcal-bottle-night.generation_prompt: Cinematic low-key product-glamour photograph of the same hand-blown clay-tinted mezcal bottle, now set against deep night-clay near-black background, a single narrow warm rim light grazing the right shoulder of the bottle, terracotta wax seal catching a soft accent of ember red, deep negative space, restrained moody stillness, awwwards closing plate composition, no text or logos.
mezcal-bottle-night.placement: Right side of the closing two-column plate, paired with the night-clay copy block.
